jd_text:
Job description
AI Automation Engineer Intern (Summer 2026)
Sivana AI
Remote | 25–30 hrs/week

Sivana AI is an AI automation firm focused on building and deploying systems that replace manual workflows across modern businesses.

We are currently bringing on a small group of engineers to work directly with our team on real automation systems used in both internal operations and client environments.

This is a hands-on, execution-focused role. You will not be working on isolated projects. You will be contributing to systems that are actively being built and deployed.

What You’ll Work On

Automated posting systems across social media platforms
Outbound messaging workflows into niche-specific communities
Email automation and communication pipelines
Internal and client-facing automation systems
Work will involve building and configuring automation workflows using modern AI tools such as Claude CoWork, OpenClaw, and related platforms.

What This Role Looks Like

Remote, 25–30 hours per week
Summer internship with potential transition into a long-term, paid role
Work directly with a small, fast-moving team across Sivana AI and NovaChat
Task-based execution with opportunities to contribute ideas and improvements
What We’re Looking For

Strong interest in AI and automation systems
Ability to learn quickly and operate in a fast-paced environment
Clear communication and ability to work within a team
Willingness to take ownership of tasks and move with speed
This role is best suited for individuals who are serious about building and want real exposure to how automation systems are deployed in business environments.

Preferred (Not Required)

Experience with automation tools, APIs, or workflow systems
Exposure to AI tools or agent-based systems
Examples of past projects or systems built
Growth Opportunity

Top performers will have the opportunity to transition into a long-term, paid role while continuing through university.

We are only selecting a small number of candidates for this role.

If you have experience building systems or automations, we encourage you to include examples of your work.
